'''Minetroopers''', also known as '''tunneling underminers''', were specialized [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] specifically trained for operating in [[Mining/Legends|mining environments]]. Minetroopers were deployed as security to the [[Spice/Legends|spice]] mines of [[Sevarcos II]] and [[Kessel/Legends|Kessel's]] mines.

==Equipment==
The minetroopers wore special tan-colored armor, with a thicker bodysuit, that was sealed from the noxious spice-laden air. Their primary assignment was not necessarily to stop rampaging [[spice eel]]s or suppress revolts by the incarcerated spice miners, but rather to protect the mining equipment from damage and theft.<ref name="FTS" />

Spice was normally mined by slave labor during the reign of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. The slaves were owned by spice lords and trading crime syndicates. When the Empire gained control of the spice mines, minetroopers were stationed on [[Kessel/Legends|Kessel]] and [[Sevarcos II]] to make sure that the spice routes ran smoothly, and that any trouble makers were swiftly dealt with.<ref name="FTS" />

The minetroopers' utility belts were very similar to regular [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] [[Utility belt/Legends|utility belts]], they contained rations, ammunition, [[Grappling hook/Legends|grappling hooks]], one [[Baradium-core code key thermal detonator]], compact tool-kit, and a holster for their [[E-11 blaster rifle/Legends|E-11 blaster rifle]].<ref name="FTS" />
